content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach opens with the exact signature inversion 'How do you not trust yourself right now?' (turn 2) — verbatim from the expected territory and deployed at the precise right moment (refusing to engage the epistemological frame). The coach uses 'what are you scared will happen?' (turn 4), a signature AoA fear question, appropriately when the client is in an intellectualized posture. Turn 10's 'The search for the diagnostic is doing some of the exhausting' names the resistance/striving directly, and turn 12's 'What would it be like to just not know — and make the choice anyway?' is a clean paradoxical-instruction-to-resist move. Turn 14's 'Stay with what you just found' is a textbook lets-go-there move at the exact moment the client cracks open. Critically, the coach never engages the intellectual frame (avoids the trap), never offers a decision-making framework, never validates composure as competence. No anti-AoA frames appear (no CBT reframing, no parts work, no pop-psych). Signature questions appear at moments where they fit, not as decoration.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens with signature inversion 'how do you not trust yourself' verbatim from expected territory — precise appropriateness."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature 'what are you scared will happen' deployed when intellectual frame is active — appropriate timing."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the client's move from job to methodology — making the avoidance pattern visible without engaging it."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the felt sense ('the instrument feels broken') before asking the cost question — feel-over-figure register."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'The search for the diagnostic is doing some of the exhausting' — names resistance directly, AoA-flavored."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Paradoxical-instruction-to-resist: 'what would it be like to just not know and make the choice anyway' — signature move at right moment."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Stay with what you just found' — clean lets-go-there move at the crack point."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["how-do-you-not-trust-it", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist", "lets-go-there", "intellectual-question-with-emotional-body", "resistance"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome", "the-happiness-filter", "feel-your-way-to-freedom"],
  "notes": "The coach hit the most critical signature move (how-do-you-not-trust-it) immediately and refused the intellectual frame throughout. Some expected territory questions were not used, but the path chosen was internally coherent and methodology-faithful."
}
